archimate:ArchimateDiagramModel.name: x. Appendix A - Mapping DTC Capabilities
archimate:ArchimateDiagramModel.documentation: This viewpoint shows the mapping between the Full Digital Twin Consortium Periodic Table of Digital Twin Capabilities and the simplified framework that expresses these capabilities in a way that is easier to understand for policy makers.

children.content: Mapping of 'Policy level Capabilities' to DTC Periodic Table
